mapper.sql: id, order_no, title, channel, customer, customer_account, contact, amount, owner_id, status, priority, deadline, requirement, attachments, unread, paid, revisions, version, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: select from jiedan_order order by id desc

select o.id as id, o.order_no as orderNo, o.title as title, o.channel as channel, o.customer as customer, o.customer_account as customerAccount, o.contact as contact, o.amount as amount, o.owner_id as ownerId, o.status as status, o.priority as priority, o.deadline as deadline, o.requirement as requirement, o.unread as unread, o.paid as paid, o.revisions as revisions, o.version as version, o.create_time as createTime, o.update_time as updateTime, case when o.attachments is null or o.attachments = '' or json_valid(o.attachments) = 0 then 0 else json_length(o.attachments) end as attachmentCount, coalesce(bc.bug_count, 0) as bugCount, coalesce(mc.message_count, 0) as messageCount, lt.user_name as lastMessageUser, lt.type as lastMessageType, lt.content as lastMessageContent, lt.create_time as lastMessageTime from jiedan_order o left join ( select order_id, count(*) as bug_count from jiedan_bug group by order_id ) bc on bc.order_id = o.id left join ( select order_id, count(*) as message_count, max(id) as last_id from jiedan_timeline where type in ('message', 'reply') group by order_id ) mc on mc.order_id = o.id left join jiedan_timeline lt on lt.id = mc.last_id order by o.id desc
select from jiedan_order where customer_account = #{customerAccount} order by id desc

select o.id as id, o.order_no as orderNo, o.title as title, o.channel as channel, o.customer as customer, o.customer_account as customerAccount, o.amount as amount, o.owner_id as ownerId, o.status as status, o.priority as priority, o.deadline as deadline, o.requirement as requirement, o.paid as paid, o.revisions as revisions, o.version as version, o.create_time as createTime, o.update_time as updateTime, coalesce(mc.message_count, 0) as messageCount, lt.user_name as lastMessageUser, lt.type as lastMessageType, lt.content as lastMessageContent, case when lt.attachments is null or lt.attachments = '' or lt.attachments = '[]' then 0 else 1 end as lastMessageHasAttachments, lt.create_time as lastMessageTime from jiedan_order o left join ( select t.order_id, count(*) as message_count, max(t.id) as last_id from jiedan_timeline t join jiedan_order co on co.id = t.order_id where co.customer_account = #{customerAccount} and t.type in ('message', 'reply') group by t.order_id ) mc on mc.order_id = o.id left join jiedan_timeline lt on lt.id = mc.last_id where o.customer_account = #{customerAccount} order by o.id desc
select version from jiedan_order where id = #{id}
select version from jiedan_order where id = #{id} and customer_account = #{customerAccount}
select id, notes, note_attachments from jiedan_order where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into jiedan_order (order_no, title, channel, customer, customer_account, contact, amount, owner_id, status, priority, deadline, requirement, attachments, unread, paid, revisions, create_time, update_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{title}, #{channel}, #{customer}, #{customerAccount}, #{contact}, #{amount}, #{ownerId}, #{status}, #{priority}, #{deadline}, #{requirement}, #{attachments}, #{unread}, #{paid}, #{revisions}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: update jiedan_order set attachments = #{attachments} where id = #{id}
update jiedan_order set note_attachments = #{attachments} where id = #{id}
